<!--
For the rsx129921/superpowers fork. Captures real CC frictions experienced
during daily-driver use. Per the fork's design spec: every fork-specific
addition must solve a real friction someone actually experienced. This
template is the front-door for collecting that evidence.
-->

## What happened in the session?
<!-- Describe the specific moment. What were you trying to do? What did
     Claude actually do? -->

## Which superpowers behavior failed?
<!-- e.g. "brainstorming skill didn't auto-trigger when I said 'let's build X'"
     or "systematic-debugging fired but ignored cognee even though it's
     available" -->

## What did you expect instead?

## Transcript or session log
<!-- The single most useful thing. Paste relevant excerpts. -->

## Failure-mode classification (check any that apply)

- [ ] Rationalization — Claude knew the skill existed but decided not to use it
- [ ] Pattern-blindness — user message should have triggered the skill but didn't
- [ ] Compaction amnesia — skill discipline degraded after context compaction
- [ ] MCP blindness — skill ran but ignored available episodic-memory / cognee-memory
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Possible fix shape
<!-- Optional. If you have a hunch — keyword pattern, hook tweak, skill prose
     change — note it here. -->
